welcome.subtitle: Connect with verified nurses, physiotherapists, and caregivers in Tunisia. Quality home care when you need it most.

header.slogan: taking care of others is our priority

services.title: Our Healthcare Services
services.subtitle: Professional healthcare services delivered to your home by verified medical professionals

nursing.title: Nursing Care
nursing.description: Professional nursing services including wound care, medication administration, and health monitoring.

physiotherapy.title: Physiotherapy
physiotherapy.description: Rehabilitation and physical therapy services to help you recover and maintain mobility.

personalCare.title: Personal Care
personalCare.description: Compassionate caregiving services for elderly and patients with special needs.

steps.title: How Wi Help Works
steps.subtitle: Simple steps to get professional healthcare at home

request.title: Request Care
request.description: Tell us what type of care you need and when. Our smart system will find the right professional for you.

match.title: Get Matched
match.description: We instantly match you with verified healthcare professionals in your area based on availability and expertise.

receive.title: Receive Care
receive.description: Your healthcare professional arrives at your location to provide quality care. Pay securely through the app.

reviews.subtitle: Real stories from patients and professionals who trust Wi-Help for their care and practice.

sarah.review: Wi-Help made it so easy to get nursing care for my elderly mother. The nurse was professional, caring, and arrived exactly on time.

ahmed.review: The physiotherapy sessions at home helped me recover much faster. The app made booking and payment seamless.

fatima.review: Excellent service! The caregiver was compassionate and professional. Wi-Help truly understands patient needs.

mohamed.review: The home care services were outstanding. The staff was punctual and very attentive to my needs. Highly recommend Wi-Help!

join.title: Join Our Network of Healthcare Professionals
join.subtitle: Expand your practice, reach more patients, and earn more with Wi-Help's professional platform.
